summary: Unblocked: aria2c model-download speed-up already in current Pod images; no rebuild gate. App-side work only, independent of MPI-81 rebuild batch.
Moved MPI-78 from To do to To do.

Investigated + planned: no-volume Any-region ephemeral GPU Pod (user-sized container disk). App-side only, no image rebuild (start.sh works on ephemeral /workspace). maturity idea->planned, status->active, plan.md + brief.md written.
Implementation started: no-volume Any-region ephemeral GPU Pod. maturity planned->in-progress.

Live test 1: UI + no-volume Pod create WORK (Any-region option, ephemeral disk input, A40 Pod created with no volume). Connect failed only at image pull: v0.4.6-cu124 manifest unknown (MPI-103 image not built yet). maturity in-progress->validating; verify blocked on MPI-103 v0.4.6 build (user chose to wait, no temp-pin).
End-to-end verify blocked on MPI-103 v0.4.6 GHCR image.

Live test 2+3: disk-size control was a no-op — RunPod auto-mounts a 20GB default volume at /workspace, models hardcoded there by start.sh. Scope grew to an IMAGE fix: start.sh CUBRIC_ROOT=/cubric-data on CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL=1 + app sends the env. Handed cu124 rebuild to MPI-103 image-owner (no bump, reuse v0.4.6). Verify blocked on rebuild.
Verified live + complete: no-volume Any-region ephemeral Pod ships model to container disk (7GB/60GB), default volume unused. maturity validating->complete.
Live test 4 PASS: Disk 7GB/12% of 60GB (model on container disk), Volume 0 bytes (default 20GB unused). cu124 rebuilt with start.sh /cubric-data fix. MPI-78 verified end-to-end.
